[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000010100 2
1 100110000 3
2 000001000 1
3 000000100 1
4 000000000 a
5 000101110 4
6 101001011 5
7 001000100 2

01 10 100111111 7
12 21 000001111 4
23 32 100001111 5
34 43 100101111 6
45 54 101111111 8
56 65 101010111 6
67 76 001011111 6
70 07 100111111 7

02 20 100111110 6
13 31 100001111 5
24 42 000101110 4 match 5
35 53 101010111 6
46 64 001101110 5
57 75 101011111 7
60 06 101111100 6
71 17 000011111 5

50 05 101111111 8
61 16 001001111 5
72 27 000011111 5

37 73 100011111 6
